evidence.claim: Used LlamaIndex, Deep Learning, TTS, MLOps, PyTorch, Spring Boot, OpenCV, Embeddings, Vector Search, Elasticsearch, Redis, pgvector, Haystack, GANs, and Python
evidence.source_text: Skills: LlamaIndex (expert, 96mo, 7 endorsements); Deep Learning (advanced, 21mo, 30 endorsements); TTS (advanced, 58mo, 43 endorsements); MLOps (advanced, 29mo, 3 endorsements); PyTorch (expert, 65mo, 24 endorsements); Spring Boot (beginner, 14mo, 0 endorsements); OpenCV (intermediate, 23mo, 15 endorsements); Marketing (beginner, 5mo, 7 endorsements); Embeddings (advanced, 35mo, 20 endorsements); Vector Search (advanced, 47mo, 45 endorsements); Elasticsearch (advanced, 37mo, 11 endorsements); Redis (intermediate, 14mo, 14 endorsements); pgvector (expert, 94mo, 53 endorsements); Haystack (expert, 95mo, 25 endorsements); GANs (advanced, 34mo, 53 endorsements); Python (expert, 94mo, 35 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for 500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system for 10M+ users using collaborative filtering and gradient-boosted models
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking. The system uses item-item similarity (via sentence-transformer embeddings) for cold starts and a gradient-boosted model trained on engagement signals for warm users.

evidence.claim: Improved search relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Led team migrating keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over theoretical learning
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
